title: DNA Extraction of Daphnia and Symbionts
author: Pascal Angst

steps.title: Add Sample and 200 µL Cell...
steps.instruction: Add Sample and 200 µL Cell Lysis Solution Qiagen Catalog #1045696 to a 1.5 ml tube. (See abstract for how to prepare the animals.)

steps.title: Grind animals with a clean, DNA(ase)-free...
steps.instruction: Grind animals with a clean, DNA(ase)-free plastic pestle, matching the shape of the 1.5 ml tube to maximize tissue maceration.

steps.title: Add 300 µL Cell Lysis Solution...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL Cell Lysis Solution Qiagen Catalog #1045696 and vortex shortly.

steps.title: Add 20 µL ProtK 20 mg/mL...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL ProtK 20 mg/mL and carefully invert 25 times.

steps.title: Incubate at 55 °C while shaking...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55 °C while shaking at 400 rpm, °C, overnight ( Overnight incubation increases yield dramatically).

steps.title: Put sample On ice , add...
steps.instruction: Put sample On ice , add 20 µL RNAse A 20 mg/mL to the cooled sample, and carefully invert 25 times.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C while shaking...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C while shaking at 400 rpm, °C, for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Put sample on On ice for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Put sample on On ice for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Add 300 µL Protein Precipitation Solution...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL Protein Precipitation Solution Qiagen Catalog #1045697 and vortex for 00:00:15 .

steps.title: Centrifuge for 00:04:00 at 16000 x g, °C,
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 00:04:00 at 16000 x g, °C, .

steps.title: Pipette supernatant ( 800 µL – 1
steps.instruction: Pipette supernatant ( 800 µL – 1.000 µL ) to a 2 ml tube. Discard tissue.

steps.title: Add the same amount of isopropanol...
steps.instruction: Add the same amount of isopropanol ( 800 µL – 1.000 µL ) to the supernatant and carefully invert 25 times.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 00:03:00 at 16000 x g, °C,
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 00:03:00 at 16000 x g, °C, .

steps.title: Discard supernatant, add 500 µL 70...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant, add 500 µL 70 % ethanol, and carefully invert until the pellet dislodges.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 00:01:00 at 16000 x g, °C,
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 00:01:00 at 16000 x g, °C, .

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Apply SRE Kit PacBio Catalog #102-208-300...
steps.instruction: Apply SRE Kit PacBio Catalog #102-208-300 for HMW DNA and repeat step 14.-16. twice for purification.

steps.title: Put the open tube in the vacuum centrifuge for 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Put the open tube in the vacuum centrifuge for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Add 80 µL DNA Hydration Solution...
steps.instruction: Add 80 µL DNA Hydration Solution Qiagen Catalog #1045698 and incubate in the dark overnight. If fewer animals are being used or less DNA yield is expected, add less ( 20 µL - 50 µL )

steps.title: For HMW DNA, use snap-frozen animals...
steps.instruction: For HMW DNA, use snap-frozen animals and pre-cool lysis solution and tube with ice.

steps.title: For HMW DNA, use cold a...
steps.instruction: For HMW DNA, use cold a pestle and only move it up and down 10 times (no twisting).

steps.title: If the pellet is not tight,...
steps.instruction: If the pellet is not tight, put tube On ice for 00:05:00 and go to step #10 or pre-cool centrifuge at 4 °C .

steps.title: For HMW DNA, use a 70 μm mesh
steps.instruction: For HMW DNA, use a 70 μm mesh. pluriStrainer Mini 70 µm (Cell Strainer, pluriSelect, 43-10070-40)

steps.title: For HMW DNA, carefully invert 50 times
steps.instruction: For HMW DNA, carefully invert 50 times.

steps.title: For maximum yield (but not HMW),...
steps.instruction: For maximum yield (but not HMW), use cold isopropanol and add 2 µL glycogen. Then, put the sample in the freezer for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: For maximum yield (but not HMW), use cold ethanol
steps.instruction: For maximum yield (but not HMW), use cold ethanol.
